name: semver
description: Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 decision procedure: classifies a change as MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH and produces the exact next version number, with pre-release/build-metadata handling and the pre-1.0.0 (0.y.z) special case. Grounded in a bundled distilled copy of the semver.org spec, so it works fully offline. Auto-engages via the 'semver' skill whenever a version is being bumped or a release/tag/CHANGELOG entry is being decided; slash-available as /semver:semver.
